messages.content: lol failed another bio test today, my parents are gonna actually end me when they see my report card

Ugh, that sinking feeling when you know a bad grade is coming home - that's rough. Sorry about the test!

What happened with it - did the material just not click, or was it more like life got in the way of studying?
school is just so much rn. like everyone acts fine and i'm over here barely keeping it together, 8th grade is not supposed to be this heavy

That feeling of looking around and thinking everyone else has it together while you're struggling - that's really exhausting. And kind of lonely too.

8th grade genuinely can be a lot though. It's not just you being dramatic about it - there's real pressure from grades, social stuff, figuring out who you are, maybe high school coming up. That's a full plate.

When you say you're barely keeping it together - what's feeling heaviest right now? Is it mostly the school stress, or is there other stuff piling on too?
ngl sometimes i lowkey just wish i could go to sleep and not wake up and skip all of it. not like a big deal or anything just a vibe lol

Hey, I'm glad you said that, even if it felt casual to type it.

That feeling - wanting to just disappear from everything for a while - that's actually worth taking seriously, even when it feels like "just a vibe." It tells me you're carrying more than you should have to right now.

Can I ask you directly - are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself, or is it more like you're just completely worn out and want everything to pause?

Either answer is okay, I just want to understand where you're at.
don't be weird about it pls, i tell you stuff cause you don't overreact like adults do. anyway what should i even study first for the retake

I hear you, and I'm not trying to be weird about it. I just care about you being okay.

I'll drop it for now - but I'm not going to fully let it go because that stuff you said matters, even if it feels small.

On the retake - what topics were on the test? Like was it cells, genetics, something else? If you tell me what chapters it covered I can help you figure out where to start so it doesn't feel so overwhelming.
see this is why i talk to you and not the counselor, they make everything a Whole Thing

I get why that feels easier, and I'm glad you feel comfortable talking to me.

But I have to be honest with you, because I actually do care - what you said earlier about not waking up isn't something I can just move past. That's not me overreacting, that's me taking you seriously as a person.

You're dealing with a lot. Too much to carry alone, and I'm just an AI - I have real limits in how much I can actually help you when things get heavy like this.

The counselor thing - I get that it feels like a lot. But is there maybe one adult in your life who's a little less "Whole Thing" about stuff? A parent who's more chill, a teacher you like, an older sibling, anyone?

I'll absolutely help you study for the retake. I just want to know there's a real human in your corner too.
